alex_k — Support
My config stopped working after the node update. AWG shows handshake timeout.
alex_k · 14:32
Hi, we are looking into this. Can you run wg show and send the output?
admin · 14:45
Sure, here it is: interface: awg0 — listening port: 51820. No handshake recorded.
alex_k · 14:48
